AI creates projects • Teams form • Credits roll

Stop looking for work.
Let work find you.

ShowBizy uses AI to generate complete film, music, and photo projects—then assembles the perfect team of directors, actors, cinematographers & crew to bring them to life.

Team formation

How ShowBizy works

From AI concept to finished project in 4 steps

🤖
STEP 01

AI Creates The Project

Complete script, storyboard, shot list, mood board, and budget. Everything needed to start shooting.

🎯
STEP 02

Creatives Get Matched

Directors, actors, DPs, sound, editors—AI suggests the perfect team based on style & location.

🎬
STEP 03

Team Forms & Creates

Built-in collaboration tools. Script notes, shot planning, file sharing, progress tracking.

🏆
STEP 04

Credits & Portfolio

Automatic IMDb/LinkedIn credits. Community voting. Build your reel with real projects.

Example AI-generated projects

Real briefs created by our AI—ready for teams to execute

Short Film

"The Last Bookstore"

Drama / 8 min

In a world where all books are digital, an elderly woman runs the last physical bookstore. A young programmer discovers it and learns what we lose when everything becomes virtual.

Director2 ActorsDPSound
Music Video

"Neon Dreams"

Electronic / 3 min

Surreal journey through a cyberpunk city. Dancer moves through neon-lit streets, projections, and mirrors. Visual effects in post.

DirectorDancerDPEditor
Photo Series

"Blue Hour Workers"

Documentary / 20 photos

Portraits of night shift workers during the "blue hour"—that magical time between night and dawn. Capturing quiet dignity of unseen labor.

Photographer3 SubjectsEditor

Built for creatives

Whether you're starting out or pivoting careers

Actors

❌ Waiting for auditions

✓ Get cast in 3-5 projects/month. Build your reel with actual scenes.

Directors

❌ No budget for shorts

✓ AI handles pre-production. You focus on vision and execution.

Cinematographers

❌ Need portfolio pieces

✓ Every project needs a DP. Build a diverse reel fast.

Writers

❌ Scripts sit unread

✓ See your stories produced. Get writing credits.
